title: Cryptographic Hash Function
scenario: Create a prompt to generate a cryptographic hash function using a specific algorithm. The prompt should include input parameters and the desired output format. The target output should be a Python function.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the generated hash function accurately implements the SHA-256 algorithm.
Check if the Python code is syntactically valid.
Evaluate the code's readability and adherence to Python best practices.
